active.notes: Revalidated June 5, 2026. Destructoid updated June 4 lists it active; GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, Pro Game Guides May 27, PC Gamer June 2, and PCGamesN June 4 also list or support it. Beebom, Dexerto, and PC Gamer support the stored reward bundle; PCGamesN still conflicts with a smaller/swapped bundle. GamesRadar remains the clearest level 12,500 source. No in-game redeem test was performed.
